title: Resource Object Include (0x6C)
description: Layout for triplet 0x6C: Resource Object Include. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are intentionally not represented here.

elements.name: ObjName
elements.description: Name of the object (EBCDIC CHAR, 8 bytes).

elements.name: XobjSet
elements.description: X axis origin for the object (signed binary, 2 bytes). Range -32768 to 32767.

elements.name: YobjSet
elements.description: Y axis origin for the object (signed binary, 2 bytes). Range -32768 to 32767.
